examples: This reply fully satisfied the Councillor; the title suited the dress.
The Councillor knew nothing of the age in which he at that moment was.
The Councillor stood still, and watched a most strange procession pass by.
Hull Road ward councillor Neil Barnes said it had been a "proud moment for York".
Carmarthenshire Councillor Ieuan Jones, the executive board member for education, described the protest as "a nonsense".
